## Summary

## Contributor declaration (required)

Please confirm each of the following — PRs cannot be merged until all are checked:

- [ ] This contribution is my **own original work** and I have the right to submit it.
- [ ] It is **not derived from, and was not written by consulting, the source code** of FFmpeg/libav\*, JM/HM/reference decoders, or any other codec or reference implementation — only public specifications were used. *(Running such tools as a black-box validator is fine; reading their source is not.)*
- [ ] It is **free of third-party licensing obligations** (no GPL/LGPL/other-licensed code copied or adapted). Spec-defined numeric data tables are fine.
- [ ] I agree to license this contribution under the **MIT License** as part of OxideAV.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` pass.
- [ ] No specification PDFs or third-party media committed as fixtures.
- [ ] `[package] version` not changed (releases are automated).

<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md for the clean-room rule in full. -->
